body:
Hey Amara,

Following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to loop back on the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deal now that their Series A terms are closer to finalized. We've been doing more diligence on their grid-balancing stack and I think there's a real co-investment angle here that would fit well with what [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has been building toward on the climate infra side. Would love to get on a call this week to walk through the cap table and talk about whether a shared lead structure makes sense for both of us. Let me know what your schedule looks like — I'm flexible Thursday or Friday afternoon.

Felix
